C2_sigma_vector_channel.verdict: does NOT commute -> branch-split intrinsic -> CHIRAL faithful; even law would be a sourceless override (F67 S3)

C3_branch_split_is_O_k2.verdict: even and chiral laws share the linear (c=1/sqrt3) term (a1~0); they differ only at O(k^2) (a2!=0) -> the quantity the even law discards is exactly the vacuum birefringence

C4_even_erases_W_branch_content.verdict: chiral law gives S = -dOmega*N (the two W helicities ride Omega^+/Omega^- -> branch content present); the even/paired law gives S~0 -> that helicity-distinguishing content is discarded. For the W this content carries its parity violation, so the even law is not a free swap.
